channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Commercial Waste being left on street, 10th July
item.description:
Commercial waste from kebab shop continually being left on street without proper bag / labels

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Removing bollard, 10th July
item.description:
People keep removing the bollard here and now cars are driving through making it very dangerous for children going to the park nearby. Please fix the bollard or replace with something more permanent.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken park bench, 10th July
item.description:
The park bench opposite Edgebury School, adjacent to bus shelter S is broken with a long nail sticking out of the top. The bench is very unstable and it looks like it has been worked out of the ground.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road signs, 10th July
item.description:
Road has been closed But the signs have been set up incorrectly and are sending cars down a short road and is causing a lot of traffic Buses are getting stuck Outside Sundridge Parade
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish outside the bin, 10th July
item.description:
Broken furniture in Brookhill Road 54

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookhill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 10th July
item.description:
Multiple graffiti on M&S

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars parked on double yellows, 10th July
item.description:
Same cars! Always to do with the beauty salon! The black car is so dangerously parked! KJ23 HPC AND MC23 HNH I believe these are the cars of the owners of that beauty salon and they are consistently parking not only on double Yellow right on a corner it’s dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Philip Lane, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 10th July
item.description:
Graffiti on on-ramp wall and under overpass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped pieces of wood, 10th July
item.description:
Dumped pieces of wood

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-6, Rothsay Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin missing, 10th July
item.description:
Bin required at Blackwall Tunnel Southern Approach on-ramp: despite multiple reports to council about rubbish on the footpath and by the road a more reliable solution is needed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The spinning top equipment does not turn., 10th July
item.description:
The spinning play equipment does not turn. It’s meant to spin round

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping Denham Street SE10, 10th July
item.description:
Some tramps have flytipped a load of stuff in Denham Street. This has seemingly occured in broad daylight (today 10/07/2026) as this was not here at 07:30 this morning. It seems RoBG's crackdown in Dandridge Close the other day has prompted out local regular fly tipper in these parts to dump a load of waste in Denham Street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Denham Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foliage on tree trunk. On bend in road, 10th July
item.description:
Bend of road in Chaucer Road, DA15 9AP. Leaves on trunk of tree (nos. 5 and 7) obscure vision when trying to back car out, and it is difficult to see if there are any other vehicles coming. This is a huge tree and the roots go into pavement and roots of front garden. Think roots could be growing into property.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Chaucer Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement near bus stop, 10th July
item.description:
Rubb has been left here for at least 4 days now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 143, Wellington Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glengall road, 10th July
item.description:
Street needs sweeping
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked in front of my driveway, 10th July
item.description:
Lambeth council requires all dockless bikes to be parked in designated parking zones. This clearly is parked in front of a private driveway. Absolutely disgraceful company.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kendal Close, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leak on road (pipe burst?), 10th July
item.description:
Flooding on East Dulwich Road near the small tesco next to Peckham rye from leaking pipe under pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffittii besides 62 & 64 Firs Close, 10th July
item.description:
Graffittii besides 62 & 64 Firs Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Firs Close, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent Danger ‼️ cars driving through closure., 10th July
item.description:
Reported this before but not resolved. keep seeing people lift up the metal pole and drive through this closure. It’s FULL of children and only a matter of time before one gets hit. One guy drove his car on the pavement. It’s the Wild West.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trimming needed on the big tree standing the at the corner of Wyatt Park Road from the Streatham Hill High Road, 10th July
item.description:
The tree has grown so very tall that the branches and leaves are blocking sunlight to our block as well as street lamp outside our block. During the recent flood storm on 23 June, leaves blocked our gutter as the tree is now standing at the same height as the top floor of our block. The hard and long branches are also getting very close to our balconies and windows.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wyatt Park Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
